title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
summary: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

title: Adam Back’s Bitcoin treasury company seeks new terms with Cantor for SPAC merger
summary: The Bitcoin Standard Treasury Company and Cantor Equity Partners I announced that they were looking into amending the terms of a 2025 merger deal that “better reflected market conditions.”

title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks sent stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, adding the US would probably launch further strikes.

title: US Two-Year Yield Near 2026 High in Global Bond Selloff
summary: The two-year US Treasury yield climbed back toward last month’s peak amid a selloff in global bond markets as rising oil prices rekindled worries about inflation.

title: CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

CFTC Chair Says Clarity Act Is ‘So Close’ As August Deadline Nears
CFTC Chairman Michael Selig urged Congress to pass the Clarity Act before the August recess, saying the crypto market-structure bill is "so close" despite ongoing disputes over ethics and stablecoin provisions.

Bull Bitcoin Files Landmark Legal Challenge to Annul France’s DAC8 Crypto Data Surveillance Rules

title: Bitcoin ETFs 'Turning a Corner' After Record Bleed Hits $8 Billion
summary: Investors had backed away from Bitcoin since mid-May.

title: Lucky Trader Turns $85 Into $2 Million on Robinhood Chain Meme Coin
summary: The meme coin CashCat on Robinhood Chain is the latest flavor of the hour, and one trader has turned a mini-investment into a small fortune in less than three weeks.

title: Cash App owner Block to pay $45 million after states say it made false security promises
summary: Block Inc. has agreed to pay $45 million to settle allegations brought by regulators in nearly every U.S. state.

title: Paradigm raises $1.2 billion fourth fund, expanding beyond crypto into AI and robotics
summary: Crypto venture firm Paradigm has raised its fourth fund, a $1.2 billion vehicle that will invest in crypto, AI, robotics, and other startups.

title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is ‘over’ and warns of further strikes
summary: Oil surges more than 8 per cent to exceed $80 a barrel after US president says negotiating with Tehran is a ‘waste of time’

title: Why the US and Iran are stuck in a cycle of tit-for-tat strikes
summary: Trump’s push to get ships moving through the Strait of Hormuz keeps colliding with Tehran’s resistance to cede control
